title: Nether's Cruelty
description: 🗡️ A "fun" new addition to Nether's Exoticism :)
body:
Nether's Cruelty is a small addon to **[Nether's Exoticism](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-exoticism)**, adding a new food to the mod :)

This mod bring the addition of the Moloch Steak, looted by Molochs (the mob added by Nether's Exoticism).

![moloch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d72687adf189cfa0b5f6bc40201efc27157149c.png)

This item, as well as the Moloch Egg from the base mod, can both be cooked and consumed. Moloch Meat recipes will grant Fire Resistance, and Moloch Eggs recipes granting Haste.
The mod is also compatible with Farmer's Delight, providing cutting recipes and the ability to use the mod's crafting station. 

![items from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/178b33fab107a667d5dac357e47a31c991004788.png)

_This mod is mainly a joke between me and Furti_Two, being the modded equivalent of cooking an axolotl, the goal was to make hunting the cute mod animal worth it_
